TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mutuw, title = mutuw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mutuw} }

S.FORM: mutuw ita Tayal hiya ga mutuw gmlux hkangi qa kki'an. ro qutux qutux niqan ga thoyay msqun mwah pcqrux qutux qalang.
mutuw ita Tayal hiya ga mutuw gmlux hkangi qa kki'an. ro qutux qutux niqan ga thoyay msqun mwah pcqrux qutux qalang.
S.PHON: mutuw ita tajal ħija ɣa mutuw ɣmlux ħkaŋi qa kkiʔan. ro qutux qutux niqan ɣa tħojaj ms~ɕqun mwaħ pʦ~ʨqrux qutux qalaŋ.
